whyPropyte.title: Why Propyte?
whyPropyte.subtitle: The platform that combines technology, data and experience for your real estate investment.
whyPropyte.feature1Desc: Access up-to-date ROI, appreciation and performance metrics to make informed decisions.
whyPropyte.feature2Desc: Every development is verified and backed by our real estate analysis team.
whyPropyte.feature3Desc: From search to closing, we simplify every step of the investment process.
whyPropyte.feature4Desc: Our commercial team accompanies you at every stage with dedicated, professional attention.
whyPropyte.feature5Desc: Exclusive curation of the best projects in the Riviera Maya and top destinations.
whyPropyte.feature6Desc: Bilingual platform designed for national and international investors.
whyPropyte.aud1Desc: Access the best real estate investment opportunities with ROI, appreciation and performance data.
whyPropyte.aud2Desc: Market your projects with our network of specialized advisors and internationally-reaching platform.
whyPropyte.aud3Desc: Join our commercial team and access exclusive inventory, tools and competitive commissions.

items.name: Carlos M.
items.text: The financial simulator helped me compare investment options I hadn't considered. I bought pre-sale in Tulum and already have 25% appreciation.

items.name: Patricia R.
items.text: As a foreigner, the process seemed complicated. The Propyte team explained everything about the fideicomiso and accompanied me every step. Excellent service.

items.name: Roberto L.
items.text: The market data is incredible. I could compare yields by zone before deciding. My apartment in Playa is already generating Airbnb income.

items.name: Ana G.
items.text: The platform is amazing. I found exactly what I was looking for with data I hadn't found on other portals.

items.name: Fernando T.
items.text: I invested in two apartments thanks to the Cap Rate analysis the platform offers. AirDNA data gave me confidence to make the decision.

items.name: Laura S.
items.text: I already had experience buying properties, but Propyte opened my eyes with zone analysis. I found opportunities I didn't know existed.

developers.heroSubtitle: Dedicated sales team, technology and data-driven strategy to maximize your real estate project's sales velocity.
developers.heroDescriptive: Dedicated sales team, technology and data-driven strategy to maximize your real estate project's sales velocity.
developers.value1Desc: Trained advisors focused exclusively on your development. From 2 to 20+ advisors depending on project size.
developers.value2Desc: Optimized digital strategies to attract qualified buyers. Campaigns on Google, Meta and real estate portals.
developers.value3Desc: Real-time dashboard with sales metrics, pipeline, conversion rates and campaign ROI. Automated reports.
developers.value4Desc: Strategic positioning based on competitive data. Price benchmarks, absorption rates and direct competition analysis.
developers.value5Desc: Professional sales materials: brochures, renders, virtual tours, video and digital content customized for your development.
developers.value6Desc: Continuous training for your sales team: product knowledge, closing techniques, objection handling and local market expertise.
developers.customProposalDesc: Every project is unique. We analyze your development, your market and your competition to design a tailored commercial strategy.
developers.processSubtitle: We activate your development in 4 steps
developers.step1Desc: We analyze your development, target market and direct competition.
developers.step2Desc: We design a custom commercial strategy with clear projections.
developers.step3Desc: We implement the strategy with a dedicated team and active campaigns.
developers.step4Desc: We measure, optimize and scale until we reach your sales target.
developers.faq1Q: What types of developments do you accept?
developers.faq1A: We work with vertical residential (apartments, penthouses), horizontal residential (houses, townhouses), lots and mixed-use projects in Quintana Roo and Yucatan.
developers.faq2Q: How much does the service cost?
developers.faq2A: Depends on the project size. We operate on a base commission with no fixed cost. The initial diagnosis is free.
developers.faq3Q: In which regions do you operate?
developers.faq3A: We currently operate in Playa del Carmen and Tulum, with coverage in Cancun and Merida.
developers.faq4Q: How long does it take to see results?
developers.faq4A: First qualified leads arrive in 2-4 weeks. The first closed sale typically happens between month 1 and 2 of operation.
developers.faq5A: Not required. We offer plans with and without exclusivity. Exclusivity allows us to invest more aggressively in marketing and generally produces better results.
developers.faq6A: Proprietary dashboard with CRM, real-time analytics, WhatsApp/SMS follow-up automation and automated reporting.
developers.faq7Q: Who is my point of contact?
developers.faq7A: Each development gets a dedicated Account Manager as the single point of contact, backed by the commercial and marketing team.
developers.faq8Q: Can I cancel at any time?
developers.faq8A: Yes. No early cancellation penalties. We believe our results speak for themselves.
developers.formSubtitle: Tell us about your development and receive a personalized proposal within 48 hours.
developers.formSuccessDesc: A specialist will contact you within 48 hours.

contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help.

providers.benefit1: High-value clients — national and international investors actively buying in the Riviera Maya
providers.benefit2: Pre-qualified leads — all referrals pass through need and capacity filters

legal.cookiesDescription: Use of cookies and similar technologies on propyte.com.
legal.reviewBody1: This document is being drafted and reviewed by our legal team to comply with current Mexican regulations and international best practices for data protection.
legal.reviewBody2: In the meantime, if you have questions about how we handle your information or the terms under which you use this site, contact us directly and we'll reply promptly.

brokers.heroTitle: Supercharge your real estate business with Propyte's portfolio
brokers.heroSubtitle: Join Propyte's broker network. Pre-sale inventory, sales tools and transparent commissions in Playa del Carmen and Tulum.
brokers.heroDescriptive: Join Propyte's broker network. Pre-sale inventory, sales tools and transparent commissions in Playa del Carmen and Tulum.
brokers.valueSubtitle: Everything you need to close more and better
brokers.value1Desc: Direct access to Propyte's active developments in Playa del Carmen and Tulum. Updated pricing, floor plans and availability.
brokers.value2Desc: Manage your clients and follow-ups with professional tools. No additional cost for partners.
brokers.value3Desc: Clear commission structure with defined splits from day 1.
brokers.value4Desc: Brochures, renders, videos and digital content customized with your brand for every development.
brokers.value5Desc: Propyte Academy: sales, real estate market, finance courses and certifications for you and your team.
brokers.value6Desc: Commission structure clear from day 1. No surprises or fine print.
brokers.step1Desc: Complete the form and tell us about your experience and business.
brokers.step2Desc: Welcome call with your Account Manager to activate your account.
brokers.step3Desc: Get access to the development inventory and marketing tools.
brokers.step4Desc: Share properties with your clients and close your first deal.
brokers.faq1Q: Do I need to be based in the Riviera Maya to join?
brokers.faq1A: No. You can operate from any city in Mexico or abroad. Our tools are 100% digital.
brokers.faq2Q: How much does it cost to join the broker program?
brokers.faq2A: There's no enrollment fee or monthly charge. Propyte generates revenue solely from shared closing commissions.
brokers.faq3A: Commissions vary by development (2-6% of sale value). The broker/Propyte split is defined during onboarding and is transparent from day 1.
brokers.faq4Q: Can my team of agents also access the platform?
brokers.faq4A: Yes. Each agent on your team gets their own account with configurable permissions. No user limits.
brokers.faq5A: Developments in pre-sale and construction in Playa del Carmen and Tulum. Apartments, houses, land and penthouses.
brokers.faq6A: Commissions are processed after closing. Direct bank transfer, no intermediaries.
brokers.faq7Q: Can I bring my own clients?
brokers.faq7A: Absolutely. If you already have clients interested in the region, you can assign them properties from our inventory and earn the full commission.
brokers.faq8A: Propyte Academy includes: development knowledge, sales techniques, Southeast Mexico real estate market, digital tools and certifications.
brokers.formSubtitle: Complete your details and an Account Manager will contact you within 24 hours.
brokers.formSuccessDesc: An Account Manager will contact you within 24 hours.
brokers.finalCtaTitle: Ready to supercharge your real estate business?
brokers.finalCtaSubtitle: Request access to Propyte's broker program

built.process3Desc: Full management of construction licenses and permits.
built.process4Desc: Execution with ongoing supervision and weekly reports.
built.process5Desc: Final inspection, documentation and turnkey delivery.
built.expertise1Desc: Apartments, villas and high-end residences in the Riviera Maya.
built.expertise2Desc: Boutique hotels, condo-hotels and experiential spaces.
built.expertise3Desc: Mixed-use projects with retail, residential and integrated amenities.
built.formSubtitle: Tell us your vision and we'll contact you within 24 hours.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Meet Propyte
about.subtitle: Property + Byte. Modernizing real estate brokerage with data, technology and transparency.
about.introP1: Propyte is a real estate marketing firm that connects data, technology and human vision so that advisors, investors and developers make intelligent, reliable and strategic decisions. We operate in Playa del Carmen and Tulum, with planned expansion to Yucatan and Latin America.
about.introP2: Our name comes from Property + Byte: the union of real estate with data intelligence. We don't sell smoke or empty promises. We give every investor better tools, better market insight and a real advantage when making decisions.
about.missionText: We market residential and investment real estate developments, connecting advisors, investors and developers through clear processes, applied technology and strategic analysis, offering an efficient, transparent and results-oriented experience.
about.mission1Desc: We don't sell individual homes. We represent complete projects: residential, touristic and investment.
about.mission2Desc: Developer, investor and advisor. Three actors that historically operate disconnected. Propyte connects them.
about.mission3Desc: CRM, financial simulators, performance dashboards and real ROI analysis. Not intuition — data.
about.mission4Desc: If something doesn't add up, we say it. If a project isn't right for a certain profile, we point it out. Trust is built by telling the truth.
about.visionText: To be the most reliable, efficient and technologically advanced real estate marketer in Latin America, recognized for professionalizing brokerage through structure, data and a well-supported commercial talent ecosystem.
about.vision1Desc: When someone hears 'Propyte' they think: I can trust them.
about.vision2Desc: Technology so decisions are based on data, not gut feelings.
about.vision3Desc: Proof that there's another way to do real estate: with structure, training and standards.
about.valueTitle: Who do we create value for?
about.value1Desc: CRM, commercial materials, constant training and product analysis. You arrive prepared to every conversation — no need to improvise arguments.
about.value2Desc: Real numbers, logically projected scenarios, explained risks and end-to-end support. We don't sell a dream — we present an informed decision.
about.value3Desc: We understand your product, protect your brand, structure your commercial positioning and give real pipeline visibility. We're a strategic partner.
about.value4Desc: Clear commissions, updated inventory, professional materials and a process where you know exactly where you stand at all times.
about.culture1Desc: You don't advance by seniority or by being likeable. You advance because your results, discipline and professionalism demonstrate it consistently.
about.culture2Desc: Every data point has a source. Every recommendation has evidence. We don't use motivational language as a substitute for argument.
about.culture3Desc: If a project isn't right for a certain profile, we point it out. Trust is built by telling the truth, not what the other person wants to hear.
about.culture4Desc: CRM, simulators, dashboards — not to complicate, but so every conversation is backed by real information.
about.culture5Desc: Every process, every tool, every operational decision passes through a filter: could a new Team Leader execute this in another city with just the manual?
about.ctaTitle: Want to be part of it?
about.ctaSubtitle: We're looking for advisors, Team Leaders and commercial allies who share our philosophy.
about.structureSubtitle: Propyte operates as a commercial unit under a corporate structure that handles HR, finance, IT and back-office.
about.structurePhilosophyText: Propyte operates as a commercial unit under a corporate structure that handles HR, finance, IT and back-office. This allows us to focus 100% on commercial: sales, marketing and developer relations, while operational support scales independently.
about.structurePhilosophyHighlight: Every organizational decision passes through a filter: could a new Team Leader replicate this structure in another city with just the manual?
about.teamSubtitle: Certified advisors with deep knowledge of the Riviera Maya market.
about.teamIntro: Propyte's commercial team operates from the Real Estate Lab on 5th Avenue, Playa del Carmen, with coverage in Tulum through Nativa Tulum. Every advisor is registered with SEDETUS and trained under our Commercial Playbook.
about.teamMore: + 5 active advisors in Playa del Carmen and Tulum
about.careerSubtitle: You don't advance by seniority. You advance because your results demonstrate it.
about.level1Desc: Training, SEDETUS certification and first field tests.
about.level1Req: 2 deals in the same quarter + 3 months of consistent operational standards.
about.level2Desc: Sustained results, operational autonomy and team reference.
about.level2Req: 2 deals/quarter for 2 consecutive quarters + top 3 in production.
about.level3Desc: You close consistently, your CRM is exemplary and other advisors seek you out to learn.
about.level3Req: 4 sustained deals/quarter + 2 quarters as Top Producer + demonstrated mentoring ability.
about.level4Desc: You lead a team of 3-5 advisors. Your impact is measured by your people's performance.
about.level4Req: 4 quarters of sustained team improvement. The best Team Leader grows the most advisors.
about.level5Desc: Responsible for the complete commercial operation of a location. You lead the strategy.
about.dim1Desc: How much you close and with what consistency.
about.dim2Desc: How you use the CRM, how you record, how you follow up.
about.dim3Desc: How many meetings you schedule, complete and convert.
about.benefitsTitle: What you get when you join
about.benefit1Desc: Detailed operational manual with scripts, processes, methodology and product guides.
about.benefit2Desc: Lead pipeline, activity tracking, financial simulators and reporting.
about.benefit3Desc: Product, sales techniques, objections, financial analysis. Weekly training.
about.benefit4Desc: Split structure documented from day 1. No surprises or fine print.
about.benefit5Desc: Support from your Team Leader with weekly coaching sessions and pipeline review.
about.benefit6Desc: 5 levels with clear and measurable requirements. Promotions by data-driven meritocracy, not perception.
about.lookingForTitle: What we look for in a Propyte advisor
about.yes1: Hunger for results with operational discipline
about.yes2: Ability to learn fast and apply processes
about.yes4: Radical honesty with clients and team
about.no1: "I sell my way" without following processes
about.no2: Aversion to CRM or activity logging
about.no3: Empty promises to clients to close fast
about.no4: Waiting for leads without generating own activity
about.no5: Looking for shortcuts instead of building method
about.recruitSubtitle: We're hiring advisors, Team Leaders and a Sales Manager for Playa del Carmen and Tulum.
about.recruitLocation: Real Estate Lab — Calle 5 Norte, 5th Avenue, Playa del Carmen

transparency.title: How we operate with transparency
transparency.col1Desc: We charge a commission on sales. Our structure is clear and defined before starting the business relationship.
transparency.col2Desc: We evaluate the developer's track record, construction permits, land legal status and build progress before representing a project.
transparency.col3Desc: Bank trust for foreign buyers, notarial support and permit verification in every transaction.

rentas.pageDescription: AI-powered rental estimates, ROI projections, and investment analysis for real estate in Mexico.
rentas.heroSubtitle: Rental estimates powered by Machine Learning trained on real market comparables. ROI, IRR, cap rate, and more investment metrics for every development.
rentas.disclaimer: Estimates are generated by a Machine Learning model based on market comparables. This is not investment advice. Consult an advisor for personalized analysis.
rentas.noDataHint: Run the rental analyst to generate ML estimates.
rentas.methodologyBody: Data is collected from real estate portals like Airbnb, Inmuebles24, and Mercado Libre via automated scrapers. Metrics (median, P25, P75, rent/m²) are computed in real time on filtered comparables. The ML model trains on this data to generate per-development estimates. Data is updated weekly.

mercado.heroTitle: Analyze the rental market in Mexico
mercado.heroSubtitle: Real data on occupancy, nightly rates and rental prices by zone. Compare before investing.
mercado.strSearchPlaceholder: Search a zone... (e.g., Playacar, Aldea Zama)
mercado.calcDesc: Enter the purchase price, select the zone and property type.
mercado.methodologyDisclaimer: Estimates do not constitute financial advice.
mercado.advisorDesc: Our advisors in Playa del Carmen and Tulum know every zone.
